_notes: GTM efficiency data — PartsBase. All figures from Amelia MCP unless explicitly noted. Last synced: 2026-05-27. ORO export data removed — Amelia is the authoritative source.

customers.active_accounts_source: Amelia crm_account WHERE sub_status IN ('Paid','Ordered'), deduped by account_number — 2026-05-27
customers.churn_source: Amelia crm_subscription: 203 deactivations TTM (May 2025–May 2026) / 7,639 active subscriptions — 2026-05-27
customers.new_customers_ltv_note: LTV = $342.63 × 320 (0.72 / 0.00225). Churn 🟢 Amelia; ARPU 🟢 Amelia L3M; gross margin 🔴 assumed 72%
customers.new_customers_definition: order_type='New' won SOs (status IN ('Closed Won','Accounting Review')) closed in last 3 months

booked_revenue._source: Amelia crm_subscription_order won deals by close date (status IN ('Closed Won','Accounting Review')), queried 2026-05-27
booked_revenue._note: Booked subscription order values. Includes New + Renew + Upgrade. Not ARR — use for YoY growth trends and acquisition tracking.

marketplace._note: Transactional buyers = accounts that have placed marketplace orders. Distinct from total registered users or searchers — those are not tracked in Amelia today.

costs._notes: S&M spend = $17,500/month confirmed. CAC = $300 blended target. Gross margin 72% ASSUMED — get actuals from finance.

_segment_ltv._notes: LTV = segment_new_arpu_mo × 72% gross margin / 0.225% monthly churn. LTV multiplier: 320. ARPUs from Amelia new customers last 3 months (2026-02-27 to 2026-05-27, order_type=New). Churn 🟢 Amelia-confirmed. Gross margin 🔴 assumed. Segments with n<10 are directional only.
